description: Create a five-generation family tree diagram of the British House of Windsor in draw.io using the data provided in 'windsor_genealogy.txt' on the Desktop. The diagram must include at least 20 family members, organized hierarchically from King George V (Generation 1) down to the fifth generation. Each person should be represented by a shape containing their name and birth/death years, with deceased members visually distinguished (e.g., via fill color or border style). Use solid lines for parent-child relationships and dashed lines for marriage relationships. Include a second page in the diagram titled 'Legend' that explains the line styles and color coding used. Save the editable diagram to /home/ga/Desktop/windsor_family_tree.drawio and export the first page as a PNG image to /home/ga/Desktop/windsor_family_tree.png.
